summary: Large cm/camera decomp-matching pass. It replaces several camera placeholder stubs with C, tightens camera struct/prototype typing, and adds the include coverage needed for HSD camera rendering, refract/shadow, and mpLib draw paths. decomp.dev reported +4140 matched bytes, 8 new matches, 20 improved unmatched items, and one .data regression.

key_files.role: Main matching work: implemented/fleshed out many Camera_8002xxxx functions, fn_800301D0, render callbacks, pause/free camera logic, and matching reshapes.
Added Camera_x2D0 and replaced raw Camera x2D0-x300 fields with a typed substruct; changed x37C to an s32/f32 union.
Updated prototypes for Camera_8002C1A8, Camera_8002C5B4, Camera_8002E158, Camera_800311EC, Camera_80031328, removed public fn_800301D0, and exported cm_803BCCA0.
Adjusted static globals: added cm_80453004 and commented out the static cm_803BCCA0 initializer, which coincides with the bot-reported .data regression.

what_changed: Implemented formerly placeholder camera routines including Camera_8002C1A8, Camera_8002C5B4, Camera_8002C908, Camera_8002D318, Camera_8002E234, Camera_8002E490, Camera_8002EF14, Camera_8002F0E4, Camera_8002F4D4, fn_800301D0, Camera_800304E0, Camera_800311EC, Camera_80031328, and Camera_800313E0.

Improved existing camera routines such as Camera_80029CF8, Camera_8002A0C0, Camera_8002B0E0, Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002DDC4, Camera_8002D85C, Camera_8002F9E4, Camera_8002FC7C, and Camera_80030E44.
Added Camera_x2D0 to group camera bounds, angle limits, min/max distance-like values, and a callback pointer; Camera now stores this as x2D0 instead of separate x2D0/x2D4/.../x300 fields.
Retyped Camera_8002C5B4 to take Camera_x2D0*, Camera_8002E158 to take three arguments instead of four, Camera_800311EC/Camera_80031328 to take u64 priority masks, and fn_800301D0 as static-only.
Added includes for baselib/displayfunc.h, baselib/lobj.h, lb/lbrefract.h, lb/lbshadow.h, and mp/mplib.h to support implemented render/camera code.

Filled camera render logic around HSD_CObjSetCurrent, screen erase color, Ground_801C4FAC, HSD_LObjDeleteCurrentAll, Camera_800310A0/Camera_80031074, lbRefract, lbShadow, HSD_FogSet, HSD_GObj_80390ED0, and optional mpLib debug drawing.
decomp.dev reported 8 new full matches: Camera_8002E490, Camera_8002E234, Camera_8002EF14, Camera_8002F0E4, Camera_8002A4AC, Camera_8003006C, Camera_8002B0E0, and Camera_80028B9C.
smart_moves: Converted a run of raw Camera fields into Camera_x2D0, making the pause/free camera bounds, angle clamps, distance limits, and callback usage visible and reusable across signatures.
Used typed unions for storage that is used both as frame/count state and smoothing state: x37C.s32 and x37C.f32, matching the existing x378 union pattern.
Replaced magic pad bit constants with PAD_TRIGGER_R, PAD_TRIGGER_L, PAD_BUTTON_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT/X/Y/A while preserving 64-bit controller-state checks through inputs.x10._u64 and inputs.x18._u64.
Applied small matching-oriented rewrites: scoped temporaries, direct cm_803BCCA0 field loads, cached tanf results, explicit (f32) M_PI_2 casts, MAX usage, and PAD_STACK annotations.

Factored GX priority bit decisions into inline_cam_gx_b0, inline_cam_gx_b1, and inline_cam_gx_b4, making Camera_800311EC/Camera_80031328/Camera_800313E0 easier to read while matching bitwise behavior.
Kept goto-shaped control flow in slot validation/fallback paths where the diff explicitly notes TODOs to remove gotos later, prioritizing matching over cosmetic structured control flow.
decomp_lessons: When adjacent unknown fields are always initialized and consumed together, promote them into an offset-named substruct before trying to force-match many callers; Camera_x2D0 improved both code clarity and function prototypes.

Header changes can be matching-critical: correcting Camera_8002E158's arity, Camera_8002C5B4's parameter type, and Camera_800311EC/Camera_80031328's u64 masks lined up call sites with implementation details.
For camera render callbacks, include the real libraries instead of using placeholders: displayfunc, lobj, lbrefract, lbshadow, and mplib are all needed by this implementation.
Use exact math helper choices and casts in camera code: the diff uses tanf, atan2f, sqrtf__Ff in some paths, cached tan_fov_u/tan_fov_l, and explicit (f32) M_PI_2 in HSD_ASSERTMSG comparisons.
Controller and GX-priority code can require 64-bit temporaries even when values look like small masks; this PR uses u64/s64 for pad state and gxlink_prios composition.

Watch data matching when moving globals between static definitions and extern declarations. The bot reported .data dropping from 75.21% to 37.23%, and the diff comments out the static cm_803BCCA0 initializer while adding an extern declaration.
naming_conventions: Address-based Camera_8002xxxx names are retained; no semantic renames were introduced for most functions.

The new struct is named Camera_x2D0 after its Camera offset, while its members mix semantic names such as x_min, x_max, y_min, y_max, z_min, z_max, angle_up/down/right/left with still-unknown unk28 and unk2C.
x2C4 is documented as an unknown player slot, and x2C5 is documented as the pauser slot.
fn_800301D0 remains an address-style private helper and is made static instead of exported in camera.h.
Union members use type-suffixed accessors, for example x37C.s32 and x37C.f32, to document the storage mode used by interpolation code.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: PAD_STACK was added in multiple functions, including Camera_80029CF8, Camera_8002B0E0, Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002D85C, Camera_8002DDC4, Camera_8002E490, Camera_8002F4D4, fn_800301D0, Camera_800304E0, and Camera_800313E0.

Several functions use inner scopes to constrain local lifetime and encourage desired register allocation, especially around Stage_GetCamInfoX20/X24, tanf temporaries, and transform smoothing coefficients.
Direct global field access replaced pointer temporaries in places such as Camera_8002B0E0 and Camera_8002A0C0, removing an earlier TODO about forcing cm_803BCCA0 into a register.
Some control flow intentionally remains goto-based in player-slot loops and fallback paths to match original branching before later cleanup.
The camera render path composes gxlink_prios with s64/u64 bitmasks and repeated HSD_GObj_80390ED0 calls, matching display-list phase ordering rather than abstracting it away.
The diff preserves exact sentinel values for camera slot logic, notably 0xA and 0xB, and player-slot range checks against 0..5.
review_feedback: No human PR body, reviews, or review comments were present in the slice.
decomp.dev bot reported matched code at 61.94% (+0.11%, +4140 bytes), 8 new matches, 20 improvements in unmatched items, and one .data regression of -240 bytes.
